name: testAddSystemAdmin
description: Add new system admin under super admin
descriptionHtml: Add new system admin under super admin

steps.name: Login to the site as 'System admin' with '0815.140400.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

testStage.description: Add new system admin under super admin

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' in the Header
